buildCommand: npm run build --workspace=@pokerbotai/shared && node_modules/.bin/vite build --root apps/web
installCommand: rm -f package-lock.json && npm install 2>&1 && echo '=== BIN DIR ===' && ls node_modules/.bin/ && echo '=== VITE PKG ===' && ls node_modules/vite/bin/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO VITE PACKAGE'
